benchmark_id: Apr 2026 monitoring sweep — 7 new models, 9 new benchmarks, 28 verified scores
new_model: Tencent Hy3-preview · HY-World 2.0 · Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro/V2.5 · InclusionAI Ling 2.6 1T/Flash · LLaDA 2.0 Uni
new_value: Discovered via llm-stats updates / AA / vendor blogs / arxiv. New flagship models: Tencent Hunyuan 3 (Hy3-preview, Apr 23 — 295B-A21B MoE, 256K ctx; SWE-Verified 74.4 / Terminal-Bench 2.0 54.4 / MMLU-Pro 65.76 / GSM8K 95.37 / MATH 76.28 / SuperGPQA 51.6). Tencent HY-World 2.0 (Apr 15 — 3D world foundation model, WorldMirror 2.0 ~1.2B). Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro (Apr 22 — 1T-A42B MoE, 1M ctx, τ³-Bench 72.9 LEADER, SWE-Pro 57.2, Claw-Eval 63.8). InclusionAI/Ant Group Ling 2.6 1T (Apr 23 — trillion-param non-reasoning open) + Ling 2.6 Flash (104B-A7.4B) + LLaDA 2.0 Uni (16B unified diffusion any-to-any). 9 new benchmarks: ARC-AGI-3 (Mar 25 launch — Gemini 3.1 Pro 0.37%, humans 100%, $2M prize), GAIA-2 (dynamic async), FrontierScience (OpenAI 700 expert-Q), KMMMU (Korean Multimodal MMMU — 3,466 Q × 9 disciplines × 9 visual types), QIMMA (TII Arabic 52K samples), SuperGPQA, Codeforces ELO, Claw-Eval (Xiaomi tool-agent), USAMO. Score backfills: Claude Mythos Preview SWE-Verified 93.9 SOTA + USAMO 97.6. Opus 4.7 SWE-Verified 87.6 / Terminal-Bench 2.0 69.4. GPT-5.5 Terminal-Bench 2.0 82.7 NEW SOTA + FrontierMath 51.7. GPT-5.5 Pro FrontierMath 52.4 LEADER. Gemma 4 31B AIME 2026 89.2 / GPQA Diamond 84.3 / LiveCodeBench v6 80.0 / Codeforces ELO 2150. Muse Spark HealthBench Hard 42.8 SOTA + FrontierScience 38. Gemini 3.1 Pro ARC-AGI-3 0.37%. Sources tab updated: hy3ai.com, mimo.xiaomi.com, hf.co/inclusionAI, arcprize.org, sierra.ai, openai.com/frontierscience, arxiv 2604.13058 (KMMMU), TII QIMMA, OpenReview GAIA-2.

new_model: Vendor sub-headers clickable + 전체 접기 / 전체 펼치기 controls
new_value: User-requested: '개발사별 보기 메뉴에서 "접기" 및 "펼치기" 버튼을 두어 제조사별 세부 내용을 펼쳐보거나 접어 볼 수 있도록 해주세요'. Sub-header에 ▼/▶ caret 추가, 클릭 시 해당 vendor 모델 리스트 toggle. '전체 접기'/'전체 펼치기' 버튼은 vendor 뷰에서만 노출 (다른 뷰에서는 자동 숨김). Per-region+vendor 단위로 collapse 상태 유지 (re-render 시 보존). Verified: Korea 72 rows → '전체 접기' 0 rows → click 첫 vendor 8 rows → '전체 펼치기' 72 rows.

benchmark_id: Vendor alias normalization in 개발사별 보기
new_value: User-reported: 'KT'와 'KT (K-intelligence)'는 같은 개발사, 'LG AI'와 'LG AI Research'도 같은 개발사, 'NCSoft (NC AI)'와 'NCSoft'도 같은 회사. 7개 alias 추가: KT (K-intelligence)→KT, LG AI→LG AI Research, NCSoft (NC AI)→NCSoft, Kakao Brain→Kakao, Naver→Naver Cloud, BharatGen (IIT Bombay TIH)→BharatGen, MBZUAI (UAE)→MBZUAI. Sovereign 메뉴 '개발사별 보기'에서 정확한 회사별 카운트 반영. Korea: 24→19 vendors (LG 13 합산, KT 4 합산, NCSoft 4 합산, Kakao 5 합산, Naver Cloud 10 합산). India: 11→10. UAE: 3→2. 별도 컨소시엄 (GoTo + AI Singapore, EPFL + Yale + ICRC, SNUH + Naver)는 의도적으로 분리 유지.

new_model: 3-mode toggle: 전체 보기 / 최신 active / 개발사별 보기
new_value: Sovereign AI Map 카드 헤더에 신규 토글 '개발사별 보기' 추가. 선택 시 각 region 카드 내부에서 vendor 별로 sub-header (vendor name + count) + 들여쓰기 된 모델 리스트로 표시. Vendor 그룹은 가장 최신 발표 모델 날짜 desc로 정렬, 동일 날짜는 알파벳순. Region header count도 'X vendors · Y models' 형태로 변경. 결과 (전체 region): Korea 24 vendors · 72 models, China 22 vendors · 121 models, France 5 vendors · 48 models, US-Open 10 vendors · 39 models, US Frontier (proprietary 외부 frontier 메뉴) 등.

benchmark_id: Physical AI / World Model 벤치마크 backfill (+30 scores, +25 benchmarks)
new_model: Cosmos-Reason 1 (predecessor) + GR00T N1/N1.5 (predecessors) + 25 new physical-AI benchmarks
new_value: Verified scores: Cosmos Policy LIBERO 4-suite breakdown (Spatial 98.1, Object 100.0, Goal 98.2, Long 97.6). Cosmos-Reason 1 Physical Common Sense 60.2, Embodied Reasoning 63.7, Intuitive Physics 68.7 post-RL, RoboVQA 80.0, BridgeData V2 65.0. Cosmos-Reason 2 LingoQA 77.0 (vs 63.2 Cosmos-Reason 1), #1 open-model rank on Physical AI Bench + Physical Reasoning Leaderboard. GR00T N1 RoboCasa 32.1, DexMimicGen 66.5, GR-1 Tabletop 50.0, real-world language following 46.6%. GR00T N1.5 RoboCasa 47.5 (with 30 demos), GR-1 sim 47.4, real-world language following 93.3% (2× N1), RoboCasa365 unseen-composite 20.0% SOTA. OpenVLA-7B Bridge V2 73.5% (16.5pp over RT-2-X 55B at 57.0%), LoRA matches full FT with 1.4% params. Gemini Robotics-ER 1.5 Pixmo-Point 49.5% (2× Gemini 2.0 Flash 25.8%), #1 across 15-bench aggregate. Genie 3 visual memory 60s. Skild Brain humanoid failure recovery time 7.5s. Covariant RFM-1 pick retry reduction 43%. Figure 02 + Helix BMW Spartanburg 1250 hr deployment uptime, logistics 4.31 sec/package, 94.4% barcode accuracy. 25 new benchmarks: libero_spatial/object/goal/long, bridge_v2, dexmimicgen, gr1_tabletop, robocasa365, realworld_language_following, cosmos_physical_common_sense, cosmos_embodied_reasoning, cosmos_intuitive_physics, robovqa, lingoqa, erqa, pixmo_point, physical_ai_bench, physical_reasoning_leaderboard, world_model_visual_memory, bmw_deployment_uptime, helix_logistics_throughput, helix_barcode_accuracy, pick_retry_reduction, humanoid_failure_recovery_time, openvla_lora_efficiency.

new_model: Frontier vendors (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Meta/NVIDIA/xAI/PI) excluded from Sovereign timeline
new_value: User clarified: Sovereign 타임라인에는 sovereign AI 카테고리 모델만 표시. 'US Frontier (proprietary)' + 'Physical AI' fallback series 제거. 19개 sovereign region 만 표시 (407/407 sovereign models). Frontier 모델은 Frontier Compare 탭, Physical AI 모델은 Physical AI 탭에서 별도 확인 가능. Coverage badge 단위가 'X / Y sovereign models'로 변경.

new_model: Timeline now shows every model in the registry (461/461)
new_value: Audit found 234/461 visible (51% coverage) — 54 frontier vendors (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Meta/NVIDIA/xAI/Physical Intelligence/OpenVLA) had no Sovereign region membership, and 173 models had unparseable params from name. Three fixes: (1) KNOWN_PARAMS curated map (~140 entries) for models whose names don't carry 'XB' suffix (Jamba family, Yi-Large, GigaChat, ERNIE, Doubao, Hunyuan, Pharia, FLUX, Stable Code/SD, manufacturing FMs, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, xAI Grok, etc.). (2) FRONTIER_VENDOR_REGION fallback — vendor-prefix matches map non-sovereign models to '🌐 US Frontier (proprietary)' (Anthropic/OpenAI/Google/Meta/xAI) or '🦾 Physical AI' (NVIDIA/OpenVLA/Pi/AgiBot/DeepMind robotics). (3) Models with truly unknown params plotted at sentinel y=0.05B with 0.4 opacity + '?' axis label so user sees they exist. Coverage badge added: '표시 중: 461 / 461 models · 그 중 56개는 파라미터 미공개'.

new_model: World Models · VLA Policies · Industrial Robotics · Manufacturing FMs를 종합 비교
new_value: Sovereign AI 메뉴와 별도로 embodied/simulation/industrial 관점 전용 신규 탭. 4 카테고리 ecosystem map (32+ 모델 등록): World Foundation Models (Cosmos · Genie · AgiBot · Omniverse Mega 7개), VLA Policies (GR00T · Pi-Zero · OpenVLA · Gemini Robotics-ER 7개), Industrial Robotics (Skild · Covariant · Figure · 1X · Apptronik · Agility · Sanctuary · Tesla 8개), Manufacturing FMs (Foxconn · Siemens · Hitachi · GE Vernova · Bosch · AVEVA · Autodesk · Landing AI · PTC · Dassault 10개). Cross-category benchmark leaderboard (LIBERO · RoboCasa · World Model FPS/Consistency · Gemini Instrument Reading · Skild Failure Recovery · FoxBrain news rewrite). Timeline scatter (x=date, y=category, color=vendor, 23 vendor groups). 4-axis Capability Radar (VLA Policy · World Model Coherence · Embodied Reasoning · Industrial Integration) per-category best-of-fleet 평균.

benchmark_id: 출시 타임라인 axes 재구성 — x=출시일, y=파라미터, color=region
new_model: Timeline scatter axes reoriented per user request
new_value: 기존 (x=date, y=country)에서 (x=출시일, y=파라미터 B)로 변경. y축은 log/linear/best-score 3-mode 토글 (default log scale). 각 region을 독립 series로 분리해 19색 distinct 팔레트 (Korea 녹색, France 파랑, China 황색, India 보라, Israel 핑크, UAE 청록, Singapore 주황, Switzerland 시안, US Legal/Finance 밝은 보라/장미, Russia 황록, Germany 노랑, UK 녹색, US-Open 하늘, Manufacturing/Robotics/CAD 자홍/장미/금/인디고). Legend 클릭으로 region 토글 가능. Bubble 크기는 sqrt(params)*2.4 클램핑 [8,28]px. 파라미터 정보가 없는 모델은 자동 제외 (params-log/linear 모드).

benchmark_id: Timeline + cumulative — dispose ECharts before re-render
new_value: Filter changes (period / size mode / y-mode / view mode / granularity) now properly redraw the chart. Previously echarts.init returned cached instance bound to same DOM node, so setOption merged into stale state and visual didn't update.

benchmark_id: Sovereign AI 누적 출시 추이 차트
new_model: 국가별 / 국가-개발사별 cumulative release count over time
new_value: Sovereign AI 탭에 누적 출시 추이 그래프 추가. 두 가지 뷰: (1) 국가별 — 19개 region 전체의 cumulative release count가 시간 축에 step-line으로 누적, (2) 국가-개발사별 — vendor 단위로 분해, region 필터 + Top-18 by total count. 단위(granularity) 토글: 월/분기/연도. ECharts step:'end' line + dataZoom + cross-pointer tooltip with sorted descending series ranking. Region 모드에서 Korea 72 / France 48 / China 121 / India 22 / Japan 1 등 누적 카운트 표시. Vendor 모드에서 Mistral AI 37 / Alibaba 31 / TII 16 / DeepSeek 14 / LG 11 등.

benchmark_id: Sovereign AI Map — view toggle (전체/최신 active)
new_model: 전체 보기 / 최신 active 12-month window 토글
new_value: Region map 카드 상단에 'View' 토글 추가. '전체 보기'는 등록된 모든 모델, '최신 active'는 release_date가 지난 12개월 이내인 모델만. Active 모드일 때 카운트 표시는 'X / Y active' 형태 (예: Korea 29 / 72 active). 데이터 없는 region은 '— 최근 12개월 내 출시 모델 없음' 메시지.

new_model: Country × Release Date × Param Size scatter timeline
new_value: Sovereign AI 탭에 신규 타임라인 차트 추가. x축=출시일 (time scale), y축=국가 (latest activity 기준 정렬), 버블 크기=파라미터 (또는 best score 또는 균일), 색상=카테고리 (text/multimodal/omni/video/audio). 기간 필터: 전체/2026/2025/2024/2023 이전. 크기 모드 토글: 파라미터(B) / Best benchmark / 균일. 버블 클릭 → Modal.showModel. ECharts dataZoom으로 zoom & pan. RELEASE_DATES 맵 ~280 entries 활용.

new_model: Sortable column headers across Best-of-Fleet leaderboard + 3 dimension tables
new_value: Each Sovereign AI table column header now sortable: click cycles off → desc → asc → off. Visual ▼/▲ arrow indicators, blue highlight on active column. Pattern reused from Frontier Compare (_cycleSort + _sortStates per-table). NULL values always sort last regardless of direction.
